name: BUTLER NATIONAL CORP
summary: PART I General Butler National Corporation (Butler National the Company, we, us, or our) was incorporated in 1960. Our companies design, engineer, manufacture, sell, integrate, install, repair, modify, overhaul, service and distribute a broad portfolio of aerostructures, aircraft components, avionics, accessories, subassemblies and systems (Aerospace Products).
